name: Pam's Buttermilk Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Milk (up to 2 tablespoons, if needed), optional
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together mayonnaise and buttermilk.
2. Stir in cheese, herbs, garlic powder, onion powder, and pepper.
3. Cover and store in refrigerator up to 2 weeks. If necessary, stir in milk to make of desired consistency.
4. Makes 1-1/2 cups.
5. Best if made at least a couple hours ahead of time and refrigerated.
6. For Dip: Do not stir in any milk. Serve with any kind of chips or fresh vegetables.
